title: Houston Transportation Sample Dashboard
description: Curated sample dashboard showing Houston transportation incidents through governed aggregate blocks.
prompt: Show Houston transportation incidents by ZIP and incident type for 2024.

sources.datasetTitle: Houston Transportation Incidents and Road Projects
sources.queryMethod: Curated gallery sample rendered from a validated CanvasDocument fixture.
caveats: Houston transportation is sample-first until Houston TranStar live feed access and aggregate-safe field mapping are verified.
The pilot sample excludes precise addresses and should not be treated as a complete incident feed.

props.heading: Houston transportation incidents are shown as sample-first aggregate context.
props.text: This curated example demonstrates the v1 public-pilot pattern for a third dataset without exposing precise incident locations.
bullets: Sample fallback is mandatory until live schema verification passes.
Precise addresses are classified hidden and never rendered.
ZIP geography is approximate and aggregate-only.

props.label: Sample incidents
props.helperText: Rows in the local fallback sample

props.title: Top incident types
props.subtitle: Sample counts by aggregate-safe incident type

props.title: ZIP-level transportation context
props.legend: Bubble size reflects sample incident count.
props.note: ZIP geography is approximate and not parcel-level analysis.

props.title: Sample transportation aggregates
props.caption: Aggregate-safe table excerpt for the curated gallery.

attribution.datasetTitle: Houston Transportation Incidents and Road Projects

props.methodology: The gallery fixture is checked in as validated CanvasDocument JSON and rendered only through the allowlisted block registry.
